# Brownfield Proof Point Template

Use this template when refactor plan stories have reached [Done] and passed QA.

# Project Deliverable Sign-off (Brownfield)

All refactor plan stories have been completed, reviewed, and have passed the final quality audit by the `QA Agent`.

The refactoring initiative is now ready for final human review and sign-off.

**Status**: [PENDING_APPROVAL]

To approve, change the status to `[APPROVED]`.
To reject, change the status to `[REJECTED]` and provide feedback in this document.
